definition: optical spectrometer that uses laser absorption spectrometry at different wavelengths from UV to far IR to measure the concentration of specific components

definition_ml.en: optical spectrometer that uses laser absorption spectrometry at different wavelengths from UV to far IR to measure the concentration of specific components
definition_ml.de: Optisches Spektrometer, das die Laserabsorptionsspektrometrie bei verschiedenen Wellenlängen vom UV bis zum fernen IR verwendet, um die Konzentration spezifischer Komponenten zu messen

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
